SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2017 - JUDGMENT.

REPRESENTED BY WILLIAM COOPER, COLLECTION MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
